datas.name: Peek Pod: Moments with Friends
datas.description: Peek Pod puts your closest friends right on your home screen — send photos and videos straight to your pod's widget, no feeds, no likes.

datas.name: FairyFace: Watch Face Store
datas.description: Cute, illustrated kawaii watch face themes for your Apple Watch — browse handcrafted pastel designs and install them in one tap.

datas.name: Love Widget: Live Couple Pics
datas.description: Love Widget lets couples share photos and videos directly to each other's Home Screen, count love days, and track upcoming special events.

datas.name: Pillcam Reminder: Med Tracker
datas.description: Medication reminders with optional photo proof — add your meds, get reliable alerts, and never wonder "Did I take it?"

datas.name: Theme Store: widget changer
datas.description: Full iPhone aesthetic makeover — matching app icons, home and lock wallpapers, and customizable widgets in one guided flow.

datas.name: Videorist - Video Art Maker
datas.description: Transform videos into artwork with AI-powered style transfer — oil painting, watercolor, sketch, and more. Buy once, use forever.

datas.name: Fotorist: Art Photo Editor
datas.description: Turn any photo into AI-generated artwork in seconds. Real neural style transfer with 40+ art styles — not just filters.

datas.name: Whats Song -wacky music trivia
datas.description: Hear a clip, guess the song! Drag scrambled letter tiles into the right order, climb the leaderboard, and build custom quizzes.
